mapper.sql: PATIENT_ID, VISIT_ID, ORDER_NO, ORDER_SUB_NO, REPEAT_INDICATOR, ORDER_CLASS, ORDER_TEXT, ORDER_CODE, DOSAGE, DOSAGE_UNITS, ADMINISTRATION, DURATION, DURATION_UNITS, START_DATE_TIME, STOP_DATE_TIME, FREQUENCY, FREQ_COUNTER, FREQ_INTERVAL, FREQ_INTERVAL_UNIT, FREQ_DETAIL, PERFORM_SCHEDULE, PERFORM_RESULT, ORDERING_DEPT, DOCTOR, STOP_DOCTOR, NURSE, ENTER_DATE_TIME, ORDER_STATUS, BILLING_ATTR, LAST_PERFORM_DATE_TIME, LAST_ACCTING_DATE_TIME, STOP_NURSE, STOP_ORDER_DATE_TIME, DRUG_BILLING_ATTR, PRINT_FLAG, PRINT_FLAG1, PRINT_FLAG3, RELATIVE_NO, ORDER_TYPE_NAME, ORDER_PERFORM_STATUS, QUERY_ORDER_NO, QUERY_ORDER_SUB_NO, FALLBACK_ORDER
mapper.insert: insert into ORDERS (PATIENT_ID, VISIT_ID, ORDER_NO, ORDER_SUB_NO, REPEAT_INDICATOR, ORDER_CLASS, ORDER_TEXT, ORDER_CODE, DOSAGE, DOSAGE_UNITS, ADMINISTRATION, DURATION, DURATION_UNITS, START_DATE_TIME, STOP_DATE_TIME, FREQUENCY, FREQ_COUNTER, FREQ_INTERVAL, FREQ_INTERVAL_UNIT, FREQ_DETAIL, PERFORM_SCHEDULE, PERFORM_RESULT, ORDERING_DEPT, DOCTOR, STOP_DOCTOR, NURSE, ENTER_DATE_TIME, ORDER_STATUS, BILLING_ATTR, LAST_PERFORM_DATE_TIME, LAST_ACCTING_DATE_TIME, STOP_NURSE, STOP_ORDER_DATE_TIME, DRUG_BILLING_ATTR, PRINT_FLAG, PRINT_FLAG1, PRINT_FLAG3, RELATIVE_NO, ORDER_TYPE_NAME, ORDER_PERFORM_STATUS, QUERY_ORDER_NO, QUERY_ORDER_SUB_NO, FALLBACK_ORDER) values (#{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{visitId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{orderSubNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{repeatIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{orderClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dosage,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dosageUnits,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{administration,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{duration,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{durationUnits,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{stopDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{frequency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{freqCounter,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{freqInterval,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{freqIntervalUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{freqDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{performSchedule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{performResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderingDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stopDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nurse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enterDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{orderStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{billingAttr,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{lastPerformDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastAcctingDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{stopNurse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stopOrderDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{drugBillingAttr,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{printFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{printFlag1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{printFlag3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{relativeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderPerformStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{queryOrderNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{queryOrderSubNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{fallbackOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into ORDERS
PATIENT_ID,
VISIT_ID,
ORDER_NO,
ORDER_SUB_NO,
REPEAT_INDICATOR,
ORDER_CLASS,
ORDER_TEXT,
ORDER_CODE,
DOSAGE,
DOSAGE_UNITS,
ADMINISTRATION,
DURATION,
DURATION_UNITS,
START_DATE_TIME,
STOP_DATE_TIME,
FREQUENCY,
FREQ_COUNTER,
FREQ_INTERVAL,
FREQ_INTERVAL_UNIT,
FREQ_DETAIL,
PERFORM_SCHEDULE,
PERFORM_RESULT,
ORDERING_DEPT,
DOCTOR,
STOP_DOCTOR,
NURSE,
ENTER_DATE_TIME,
ORDER_STATUS,
BILLING_ATTR,
LAST_PERFORM_DATE_TIME,
LAST_ACCTING_DATE_TIME,
STOP_NURSE,
STOP_ORDER_DATE_TIME,
DRUG_BILLING_ATTR,
PRINT_FLAG,
PRINT_FLAG1,
PRINT_FLAG3,
RELATIVE_NO,
ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
ORDER_PERFORM_STATUS,
QUERY_ORDER_NO,
QUERY_ORDER_SUB_NO,
FALLBACK_ORDER,
#{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{visitId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{orderSubNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{repeatIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{orderClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orderText,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dosage,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{dosageUnits,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{administration,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{duration,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{durationUnits,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{startDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{stopDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{frequency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{freqCounter,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{freqInterval,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{freqIntervalUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{freqDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{performSchedule,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{performResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orderingDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{doctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{stopDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nurse,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{enterDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{orderStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{billingAttr,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{lastPerformDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastAcctingDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{stopNurse,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{stopOrderDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{drugBillingAttr,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{printFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{printFlag1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{printFlag3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{relativeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orderTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orderPerformStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{queryOrderNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{queryOrderSubNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{fallbackOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update ORDERS
REPEAT_INDICATOR = #{repeatIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ORDER_CLASS = #{orderClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORDER_TEXT = #{orderText,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORDER_CODE = #{orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DOSAGE = #{dosage,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
DOSAGE_UNITS = #{dosageUnits,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ADMINISTRATION = #{administration,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DURATION = #{duration,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
DURATION_UNITS = #{durationUnits,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
START_DATE_TIME = #{startDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
STOP_DATE_TIME = #{stopDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
FREQUENCY = #{frequency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FREQ_COUNTER = #{freqCounter,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FREQ_INTERVAL = #{freqInterval,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FREQ_INTERVAL_UNIT = #{freqIntervalUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FREQ_DETAIL = #{freqDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PERFORM_SCHEDULE = #{performSchedule,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PERFORM_RESULT = #{performResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORDERING_DEPT = #{orderingDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DOCTOR = #{doctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STOP_DOCTOR = #{stopDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
NURSE = #{nurse,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ENTER_DATE_TIME = #{enterDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ORDER_STATUS = #{orderStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BILLING_ATTR = #{billingAttr,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
LAST_PERFORM_DATE_TIME = #{lastPerformDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_ACCTING_DATE_TIME = #{lastAcctingDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
STOP_NURSE = #{stopNurse,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STOP_ORDER_DATE_TIME = #{stopOrderDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DRUG_BILLING_ATTR = #{drugBillingAttr,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
PRINT_FLAG = #{printFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PRINT_FLAG1 = #{printFlag1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PRINT_FLAG3 = #{printFlag3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RELATIVE_NO = #{relativeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORDER_TYPE_NAME = #{orderTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORDER_PERFORM_STATUS = #{orderPerformStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QUERY_ORDER_NO = #{queryOrderNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
QUERY_ORDER_SUB_NO = #{queryOrderSubNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FALLBACK_ORDER = #{fallbackOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where PATIENT_ID = #{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and VISIT_ID = #{visitId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} and ORDER_NO = #{orderNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC} and ORDER_SUB_NO = #{orderSubNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select:
select
from ORDADM.ORDERS where order_text like '%死亡%' ENTER_DATE_TIME >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND ENTER_DATE_TIME < TRUNC(SYSDATE)+1
mapper.update: update ORDERS set REPEAT_INDICATOR = #{repeatIndicator,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ORDER_CLASS = #{orderClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORDER_TEXT = #{orderText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORDER_CODE = #{orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DOSAGE = #{dosage,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DOSAGE_UNITS = #{dosageUnits,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADMINISTRATION = #{administration,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DURATION = #{duration,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DURATION_UNITS = #{durationUnits,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_DATE_TIME = #{startDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, STOP_DATE_TIME = #{stopDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, FREQUENCY = #{frequency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FREQ_COUNTER = #{freqCounter,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, FREQ_INTERVAL = #{freqInterval,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, FREQ_INTERVAL_UNIT = #{freqIntervalUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FREQ_DETAIL = #{freqDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PERFORM_SCHEDULE = #{performSchedule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PERFORM_RESULT = #{performResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORDERING_DEPT = #{orderingDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DOCTOR = #{doctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STOP_DOCTOR = #{stopDoctor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NURSE = #{nurse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ENTER_DATE_TIME = LAST_ACCTING_DATE_TIME = #{lastAcctingDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, STOP_NURSE = #{stopNurse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STOP_ORDER_DATE_TIME = #{stopOrderDateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, DRUG_BILLING_ATTR = #{drugBillingAttr,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PRINT_FLAG = #{printFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRINT_FLAG1 = #{printFlag1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRINT_FLAG3 = #{printFlag3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RELATIVE_NO = #{relativeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORDER_TYPE_NAME = #{orderTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORDER_PERFORM_STATUS = #{orderPerformStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QUERY_ORDER_NO = #{queryOrderNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, QUERY_ORDER_SUB_NO = #{queryOrderSubNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, FALLBACK_ORDER = #{fallbackOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where PATIENT_ID = #{patientId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and VISIT_ID = #{visitId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} and ORDER_NO = #{orderNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC} and ORDER_SUB_NO = #{orderSubNo,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
